supranim/support/uuid

        $$

        hexify

      • hexify(uuid: Uuid): string
        uuid4
      • uuid4(): Uuid
      • uuid4(uuidBytes: array[16, uint8]): Uuid
      • uuid4(uuidStr: string): Uuid
        variant
      • variant(u: Uuid): UuidVariant
        version
      • version(u: Uuid): int

This module provides a simple and efficient way to generate unique UUIDs. It includes functions to generate version 4 UUIDs (randomly generated) and to parse UUIDs from strings or byte arrays. The implementation follows the RFC-4122 standard for UUIDs, ensuring compatibility with other systems and libraries that use UUIDs. The module also provides utility functions to determine the variant and version of a given UUID, as well as to convert UUIDs to their string representation.

Originally written by Matt Cooper

Types

Uuid = object
UUIDError = object of CatchableError
UuidVariant {.pure.} = enum
  ApolloNcs, RFC4122, ReservedFuture, ReservedMicrosoft

Procs

proc `$`(uuid: Uuid): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Return the string version of UUID 
proc `$$`(uuid: Uuid): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Return the string version of UUID without hyphens 
proc getUuidBytes(uuid: Uuid): array[16, uint8] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the byte array representation of the UUID. 
proc hexify(bytes: openArray[uint8]): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts an array of bytes to a hexadecimal string representation. 
proc hexify(uuid: Uuid): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts a Uuid object to its hexadecimal string representation. 
proc uuid4(): Uuid {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generates a random version 4 UUID. 
proc uuid4(uuidBytes: array[16, uint8]): Uuid {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a UUID directly from 16 bytes. 
proc uuid4(uuidStr: string): Uuid {....raises: [UUIDError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Parse a UUID from a string (with or without hyphens, any casing). 
proc variant(u: Uuid): UuidVariant {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Determine the variant of the UUID. Most in the wild are RFC-4122. 
proc version(u: Uuid): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Determine the version of an RFC-4122 UUID.
